summary: Implemented P10.1 (commit-time completion gate, FI-7) and P10.2 (factory:status session reconstruction command). Completion gate: evaluateCompletionGate() pure function blocks commits with non-factory implementation files when any started packet lacks completion. Pre-commit hook wired. Status command: deriveFactoryStatus() pure function reconstructs workflow state from artifacts and identifies next legal action. 28 factory tests (16 gate + 12 status). factory:test, factory:status, factory:validate scripts added.

verification.notes: All verification passed. build, lint, tests — all green.
